commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Thus says the LORD, The people who survived the sword found grace in the wilderness; even Israel, when I went to give him rest. From which the former inhabitants had been driven, (4 Kings xvii. ; Calmet) or, as those under Moses were favoured, (Haydock) so shall the captives. (Grotius) Septuagint, "I found him warm "(thermon, means also a lupin, which has misled the old Latin interpreters. Jerome) murdered "in the desert, with those slain by the sword. Go, and destroy not Israel.
